---
title: "Teaching"
sidebar: teaching
---

Here are the courses I have supported so far.

- Summer 2026: [CDS 303: Scientific Data Mining](../teaching/cds-303/index.qmd)
- Spring 2026: CDS 201: Introduction to Computational Social Science, [CDS 303: Scientific Data Mining](../teaching/cds-303/index.qmd)
- Fall 2025: CDS 230: Modeling and Simulation I
